findings.title: Validate empty-state handling in critical flows
findings.body: Add regression coverage for empty, null, and malformed payloads in recent high-traffic UI/runtime paths.
findings.reproSteps: Exercise an empty vault/project, null optional metadata, and malformed markdown/frontmatter through the nearest critical flow.
findings.expectedBehavior: The app presents a stable empty state, preserves valid data, and rejects malformed input with a recoverable error.
findings.observedBehavior: Daily intake did not find explicit regression evidence covering these edge cases.
findings.suggestedFixOrTest: Add focused tests for empty, null, and malformed payload handling in the selected flow.

githubIssueIntake.title: Validate empty-state handling in critical flows
githubIssueIntake.bodyMarkdown:
## Validate empty-state handling in critical flows

### Summary
Add regression coverage for empty, null, and malformed payloads in recent high-traffic UI/runtime paths.

### Repro steps
Exercise an empty vault/project, null optional metadata, and malformed markdown/frontmatter through the nearest critical flow.

### Expected behavior
The app presents a stable empty state, preserves valid data, and rejects malformed input with a recoverable error.

### Observed behavior
Daily intake did not find explicit regression evidence covering these edge cases.

### Suggested fix or test
Add focused tests for empty, null, and malformed payload handling in the selected flow.

### Source
Daily bug hunt intake 20260606; mode: report-only.
